layout.zcode_tools/: source of a complete ~/.zcode (AGENTS.md, skills, commands, agents, marketplace.json, plugins, config templates)
layout.build/: build artifacts: version.json, manifest.json, system files, secrets templates
layout.development/: meta skills for developing this repo

backup_policy.rotation_slots: 1-9 (lowest free slot; oldest reused when full)

secrets.injection: ${VAR} placeholders in zcode_tools/*.template.json rendered at install time
